subject: PennyAlpha Pre-Market — 2026-05-07
text:

- SITM +32.7%: above $10 ceiling ($765/share; Q1 rev +88%)

- ONEG -70%: down mover (Chinese construction microcap, no catalyst)
- SOUN -3.5%: below 5% threshold; earnings EVENT RISK tonight after close

No FDA PDUFA decisions today. Heavy earnings tonight: SOUN, PACB, ABSI, RCAT all report after close. Watchlist re-evaluation pre-market May 8.
